title: Acana Moth Killer & Freshener, Lavender, 275ml - Spray Formula, Kills Moths, Eggs & Larvae - Licensed Insecticide - Non-staining - for Carpets, Curtains & Cushions
availability_text: This item cannot be dispatched to your selected delivery location. Please choose a different delivery location.
features: EFFECTIVE MOTH KILLER. Licensed Insecticide Killing product (not just a repellent). An effective protector that should be used at the first signs of any moth infestation
WORKS IN 15 MINUTES. The instant-action fine-mist spray formula provides an immediate solution that kills moths, eggs and larvae in just 15 minutes while leaving a pleasant Lavender fragrance
VERSATILE USE. Provides protection for larger items that cannot be stored. It can also be used as a pre-treatment to create a "safe zone" before storing items away
NON-STAINING. Recommended treatment cycle: Every 3 Months
LATEST TECHNOLOGY. Uses the latest in technology for moth killing, formulated with TRANSFLUTHRIN active. Effectively kills moths, eggs and larvae and also kills Carpet Beetles

ABOUT US. Founded in 2008, Acana has developed a range of trusted products, covering insect control to moisture control. Our years of experience in the industry have enabled us to become the number one leader in the market for moth killing products
